summary: Completed Garment ERP v8.0 refactoring verification testing. Successfully verified all 21 specified API endpoints after major refactoring: PDF helpers extracted to routes/pdf_exports.py, db_auth() helper added, VendorPortalApp.jsx split into 12 components, and central API client created. All backend endpoints working correctly. Frontend loads without red screen but has API routing issue preventing login.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend making API calls to localhost:3000/api instead of configured REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL
integration_issues.impact: Login fails with 404 error, preventing access to vendor portal
integration_issues.details: API client should use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL (https://garment-erp-phase11b.preview.emergentagent.com) but requests go to localhost:3000/api

passed_tests: GET /api/export-pdf?type=unknown returns 400 with error JSON listing available types
GET /api/distribusi-kerja returns 200 object with hierarchy/flat/invalid_records keys
GET /api/financial-recap returns 200 object with financial keys
Frontend loads without red screen - login form displays correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend API routing: Frontend is making API calls to localhost:3000/api instead of using REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Check API client configuration in src/lib/api.js and ensure all components use the central API client correctly.

success_percentage.frontend: 80% (loads correctly but login fails due to API routing)
